channel.title: Accessibility on Chrome Extension&Theme
channel.description: Recent content in Accessibility on Chrome Extension&Theme

item.title: Image Picker
item.description: A lightweight Chrome extension that collects, previews, and downloads all images on any webpage — without leaving the tab.

item.title: Tab Manager
item.description: Tab Manager is a Chrome extension for keeping tab-heavy sessions under control from a side panel. It combines idle suspension, memory-saving actions, smart grouping, search, snapshots, and archive into one unified workflow.

item.title: CSDN Unlocker
item.description: CSDN Unlocker is a Chrome extension that help you view or copy article without login.

item.title: Change Google Calendar Background
item.description: Customize The Background Of Google Calendar.

item.title: Mute Tabs
item.description: Extension tool to mute Chrome browser tabs.

item.title: Night Mode Shift
item.description: All websites in the current window can be switched to night mode with just one click, and colors and their depth can be specified.
